query: SELECT slug, name, category, ownership_tier, auth_method, free_tier_description FROM integration_providers WHERE category IN ('investments', 'insurance') OR slug LIKE '%plaid%' OR slug LIKE '%snap%' ORDER BY category, slug;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute SELECT slug, name, category, ownership_tier, auth_method, free_tier_description FROM integration_providers WHERE category IN ('investments', 'insurance') OR slug LIKE '%plaid%' OR slug LIKE '%snap%' ORDER BY category, slug;

rows.name: ESI / Fidelity Wealthscape
rows.free_tier_description: Requires BridgeFT partnership. Org-level integration via Fidelity Integration Xchange.

rows.name: Plaid
rows.free_tier_description: Free sandbox (unlimited). Production requires approval. Per-connection pricing.

rows.name: SnapTrade
rows.free_tier_description: Free tier: 5 brokerage connections per API key.

rows.name: Canopy Connect
rows.free_tier_description: Free sandbox for development. Paid production plans.

rows.name: COMPULIFE
rows.free_tier_description: 2-month free trial for new subscribers. Then volume-based pricing.

stdout:
slug	name	category	ownership_tier	auth_method	free_tier_description
bridgeft	BridgeFT WealthTech API	investments	organization	api_key	No free tier. Partnership/licensing required.
esi-fidelity	ESI / Fidelity Wealthscape	investments	organization	api_key	Requires BridgeFT partnership. Org-level integration via Fidelity Integration Xchange.
plaid	Plaid	investments	organization	api_key	Free sandbox (unlimited). Production requires approval. Per-connection pricing.
snaptrade	SnapTrade	investments	professional	api_key	Free tier: 5 brokerage connections per API key.
canopy-connect	Canopy Connect	insurance	organization	api_key	Free sandbox for development. Paid production plans.
compulife	COMPULIFE	insurance	organization	api_key	2-month free trial for new subscribers. Then volume-based pricing.
ipipeline-insurance	iPipeline	insurance	organization	api_key	NULL
